heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 404 Authorization of appropriations
text: For the purpose of carrying out the provisions of this chapter and the activities of the Bureau of Dairy Industry, such sums of money as Congress may deem necessary are authorized to be appropriated.
notes: Change of Name“Bureau of Dairying” established by act , designated “Bureau of Dairy Industry” by act .May 29, 1924May 11, 1926

Transfer of FunctionsFunctions of Bureau of Dairy Industry transferred to Secretary of Agriculture by 1947 Reorg. Plan No. 1, § 301, eff. , 12 F.R. 4534, . See note set out under .July 1, 194761 Stat. 952section 391 of this titleBureau of Dairy Industry consolidated with other agencies into Agricultural Research Administration for duration of World War II by Ex. Ord. No. 9069, , 7 F.R. 1409.Feb. 23, 1942
